notes: IFS 1.0.17 - DISPLAY FIRMWARE PUSH: the Tip Charger tab now has a Display firmware panel that pulls a compiled 4D display program (.4XE) from the GitHub channel, SHA-256-verifies it, and flashes the panel with 4D's bundled ScriptC over a direct 4D USB programmer (logic-only; graphics stay on the panel uSD). A publisher script packages the Workshop output automatically. Also fixes the Opta 'won't connect' stall (display-link reconnect no longer blocks the status stream) and ships the fixed Opta firmware. Signed (Augeas Technologies).
